library(shiny) library(shinymeta) library(tidyverse) library(ggplot2) library(readr) library(lubridate) library(colourpicker) library(plotly) library(hexbin) library(bslib) library(shinycssloaders) library(shinyWidgets) options(shiny.maxRequestSize = 50 * 1024^2) # ---- Theme ----------------------------------------------- my_custom_theme <- bs_theme( version = 5, bootswatch = "lux", bg = "#ffffff", fg = "black", primary = "#0021A5", secondary = "#FA4616", base_font = font_google("Open Sans"), heading_font = font_google("Montserrat"), code_font = font_google("Fira Code") ) ifas_blue <- "#0021A5" ifas_orange <- "#FA4616" theme_ifas <- function() { theme_minimal(base_size = 12) %+replace% theme( plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, color = ifas_orange, hjust = 0, margin = margin(b = 10)), axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ifas_orange), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#e7e7e7", linewidth = .5), legend.position = "bottom", legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"), plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA), panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA) ) } apply_theme <- function(p, theme_choice) { switch(theme_choice, "IFAS Theme" = p + theme_ifas(), "Minimal" = p + theme_minimal(), "Classic" = p + theme_classic(), "BW" = p + theme_bw(), "Light" = p + theme_light(), "Dark" = p + theme_dark(), p + theme_minimal() ) } # ---- Shared helper: parse date column -------------------- try_parse_dates <- function(df) { is_date_col <- sapply(df, function(x) { if (inherits(x, c("Date", "POSIXt"))) return(TRUE) if (is.numeric(x) || is.logical(x) || all(is.na(x))) return(FALSE) sample_val <- as.character(head(x[!is.na(x)], 20)) if (length(sample_val) == 0) return(FALSE) test_parse <- suppressWarnings( lubridate::parse_date_time(sample_val, orders = c("ymd", "mdy", "dmy"), quiet = TRUE) ) sum(!is.na(test_parse)) > 0 }) date_col <- names(df)[is_date_col][1] if (!is.na(date_col)) { df[[date_col]] <- as.Date(suppressWarnings( lubridate::parse_date_time(df[[date_col]], orders = c("ymd", "mdy", "dmy"), quiet = TRUE) )) } df } # ---- Helper: parse a single character x-axis column ----- maybe_parse_x <- function(df, x_col) { if (is.character(df[[x_col]])) { test_val <- head(df[[x_col]], 20) parsed_test <- suppressWarnings( lubridate::parse_date_time(test_val, orders = c("ymd", "mdy", "dmy"), quiet = TRUE) ) if (any(!is.na(parsed_test))) { df[[x_col]] <- as.Date(suppressWarnings( lubridate::parse_date_time(df[[x_col]], orders = c("ymd", "mdy", "dmy"), quiet = TRUE) )) } } df } # ---- Shared well-panel header --------------------------- info_panel <- function(title, body) { wellPanel( style = paste0( "background-color:#ddefff;border-left:5px solid #0021A5;", "border-right:none;border-top:none;border-bottom:none;", "border-radius:4px;margin-bottom:15px;margin-top:10px;" ), h4(title, style = "color:#0021A5;margin-top:0;font-weight:bold;"), p(body, style = "margin-bottom:0;color:#333333;") ) } # ============================================================ # UI # ============================================================ ui <- fluidPage( theme = my_custom_theme, titlePanel("Data Explorer"), sidebarLayout( # ---- Sidebar ------------------------------------------ sidebarPanel( style = "background-color:#ddefff;", fileInput("file1", "Choose CSV File", multiple = FALSE, accept = c("text/csv", "text/comma-separated-values,text/plain", ".csv")), tags$hr(), h3("Data Processing"), checkboxInput("remove_na", "Exclude Rows with Missing Data", value = TRUE), checkboxInput("log_scale", "Use Logarithmic Scale (Y-axis)", value = FALSE), shinyWidgets::switchInput( inputId = "trendline", label = "Trendline", value = FALSE, onLabel = "ON", offLabel = "OFF", onStatus = "primary" ), checkboxInput("use_hex", "Large Dataset Mode (hexbin)", value = FALSE), conditionalPanel( condition = "input.use_hex == true", sliderInput("hex_bins", "Hexbin Resolution", min = 10, max = 100, value = 30) ), tags$hr(), checkboxInput("header", "Header", TRUE), radioButtons("sep", "Separator", choices = c(Comma = ",", Semicolon = ";", Tab = "\t"), selected = ","), radioButtons("quote", "Quote", choices = c(None = "", "Double Quote" = '"', "Single Quote" = "'"), selected = '"'), tags$hr(), radioButtons("disp", "Preview Rows", choices = c(Head = "head", All = "all"), selected = "head"), selectInput("x_var", "X-Axis", choices = NULL), selectInput("y_var", "Y-Axis", choices = NULL), tags$hr(), h3("Global Plot Settings"), colourpicker::colourInput("plot_color", "Plot Color", value = "#0021A5"), sliderInput("point_size", "Point Size", min = 1, max = 10, value = 3), sliderInput("bins", "Histogram Bins", min = 5, max = 100, value = 30), sliderInput("plot_alpha", "Opacity", min = 0, max = 1, value = 0.7, step = 0.05), selectInput("theme", "Theme", choices = c("IFAS Theme", "Minimal", "Classic", "BW", "Light", "Dark")), selectInput("point_shape", "Point Shape", choices = c(Circle = 16, Star = 8, Square = 15, Diamond = 18, Triangle = 17, Cross = 4), selected = 16), selectInput("color_var", "Color by (Optional):", choices = NULL), tags$hr(), uiOutput("na_warning") ), # ---- Main panel --------------------------------------- mainPanel( card( full_screen = TRUE, style = paste0( "border:1px solid #e2e9f0;", "box-shadow:0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);", "margin-top:15px;" ), tabsetPanel( type = "tabs", # ---- Data Preview ---- tabPanel("Data Preview", info_panel( "Data Structure Verification", "View the raw data structure and column types to verify accuracy before analysis." ), div(style = "margin-bottom:15px;", downloadButton("downloadData", "Download CSV", class = "btn-secondary")), tableOutput("contents") ), # ---- Data Summary ---- tabPanel("Data Summary", info_panel("Data Overview", "Summary statistics and OLS regression estimates for the selected X/Y variables."), fluidRow( column(6, h5("Descriptive Statistics", style = "color:#0021A5;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:15px;"), div(style = "overflow-x:auto;", tableOutput("summaryStats")) ), column(6, h5("Baseline OLS Regression Coefficients", style = "color:#0021A5;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:15px;"), div(style = "overflow-x:auto;", tableOutput("regressionTable")) ) ) ), # ---- Interactive Scatter ---- tabPanel("Interactive Scatter Plot", info_panel( "Best for: Relationships and Correlations", paste("Compares two numeric variables to reveal correlations, outliers, and clusters.", "Enable 'Large Dataset Mode' in the sidebar to switch to hexbin density rendering", "for very large files. For a static (downloadable) version see the next tab.") ), downloadButton("downloadScatter", "Download Plot as PNG"), shinycssloaders::withSpinner( plotlyOutput("myPlot", height = "600px"), type = 4, color = "#FA4616" ), actionButton("showCodePlot", "Show R Code"), verbatimTextOutput("plotCodeDisplay") ), # ---- Static Scatter ---- tabPanel("Static Scatter Plot", info_panel( "Best for: Large Data Sets", "Static (non-interactive) scatter plot — renders faster and is easier to download." ), downloadButton("downloadStaticScatter", "Download as PNG"), plotOutput("myStaticPlot", height = "600px"), actionButton("showCodeStaticPlot", "Show R Code"), verbatimTextOutput("staticPlotCodeDisplay") ), # ---- Histogram ---- tabPanel("Histogram", info_panel( "Best for: Distribution and Frequency", paste("Shows the shape of a single numeric variable —", "normal distribution, skew, and multiple peaks.") ), selectInput("hist_var", "Select Numeric Column", choices = NULL), downloadButton("downloadHist", "Download PNG"), shinycssloaders::withSpinner( plotlyOutput("myHist"), type = 4, color = "#FA4616" ), actionButton("showCodeHist", "Show R Code"), verbatimTextOutput("histCodeDisplay") ), # ---- Box Plot ---- tabPanel("Box Plot", info_panel( "Best for: Multiple Categories of Data", "Visualizes the spread and outliers of a numeric variable across different categories." ), downloadButton("downloadBox", "Download Plot as PNG"), shinycssloaders::withSpinner( plotlyOutput("myBox"), type = 4, color = "#FA4616" ), actionButton("showCodeBox", "Show R Code"), verbatimTextOutput("boxCodeDisplay") ), # ---- Time Trend ---- tabPanel("Time Trend", info_panel( "Best for: Patterns over Time", paste("Requires a date/time column. Reveals seasonality,", "long-term growth, or sudden drops across a chronological sequence.") ), downloadButton("downloadTrend", "Download PNG"), shinycssloaders::withSpinner( plotlyOutput("timeTrend"), type = 4, color = "#FA4616" ), actionButton("showCodeTrend", "Show R Code"), verbatimTextOutput("trendCodeDisplay") ) ) ) ) ) ) # ============================================================ # Server # ============================================================ server <- function(input, output, session) { # ---- 1. Raw data load (memoised) ---------------------- userData <- metaReactive({ req(input$file1) read.csv( ..(input$file1$datapath), header = ..(input$header), sep = ..(input$sep), quote = ..(input$quote) ) }) # ---- 2. Cleaned data (remove NA on selected cols) ----- cleanedData <- reactive({ df <- userData() req(df) if (input$remove_na) { valid_vars <- intersect( c(input$x_var, input$y_var, input$hist_var), names(df) ) if (length(valid_vars) > 0) { df <- df %>% filter(if_all(all_of(valid_vars), ~ !is.na(.))) } } if (input$log_scale) { y <- input$y_var if (!is.null(y) && y %in% names(df) && is.numeric(df[[y]])) { df[[y]] <- suppressWarnings(log(df[[y]])) df <- df[is.finite(df[[y]]), ] } } df }) # ---- 3. Update selectors on upload -------------------- observeEvent(userData(), { df <- userData() cols <- names(df) nums <- names(df)[sapply(df, is.numeric)] updateSelectInput(session, "x_var", choices = cols, selected = cols[1]) updateSelectInput(session, "y_var", choices = cols, selected = if (length(cols) > 1) cols[2] else cols[1]) updateSelectInput(session, "color_var", choices = c("None", cols), selected = "None") updateSelectInput(session, "hist_var", choices = nums) }) # ---- 4. NA warning banner ----------------------------- output$na_warning <- renderUI({ req(userData(), cleanedData()) removed <- nrow(userData()) - nrow(cleanedData()) if (input$remove_na && removed > 0) { wellPanel( style = "background-color:#fff3cd;border-color:#ffeeba;color:#856404;", tags$b("Data Health Note: "), paste0(removed, " rows with missing values were removed.") ) } }) # ---- 5. Data Preview table ---------------------------- output$contents <- renderTable({ df <- userData() req(df) if (input$disp == "head") head(df) else head(df, 100) }) output$downloadData <- downloadHandler( filename = function() paste0("data-", Sys.Date(), ".csv"), content = function(file) write.csv(userData(), file, row.names = FALSE) ) # ---- 6. Summary stats --------------------------------- output$summaryStats <- renderTable({ df <- cleanedData() req(input$x_var, input$x_var %in% names(df)) validate(need(is.numeric(df[[input$x_var]]), "Select a numeric column for summary stats.")) s <- summary(df[[input$x_var]]) data.frame(Statistic = names(s), Value = as.character(unname(s))) }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, width = "100%", digits = 4) # ---- 7. OLS regression table -------------------------- output$regressionTable <- renderTable({ df <- cleanedData() req(input$x_var, input$y_var) validate( need(is.numeric(df[[input$x_var]]), "X-Axis must be numeric for linear regression."), need(is.numeric(df[[input$y_var]]), "Y-Axis must be numeric for linear regression.") ) formula_obj <- as.formula(paste0("`", input$y_var, "` ~ `", input$x_var, "`")) fit <- lm(formula_obj, data = df) fs <- summary(fit)$coefficients coef_out <- data.frame( Term = ifelse(rownames(fs) == "(Intercept)", "Intercept (a)", paste0("Slope (\u03b2) of ", input$x_var)), Estimate = fs[, "Estimate"], `Std. Error` = fs[, "Std. Error"], `t-value` = fs[, "t value"], `p-value` = fs[, "Pr(>|t|)"], check.names = FALSE ) coef_out }, digits = 4, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, width = "100%") # ---- 8. Interactive scatter ---------------------------- scatter_obj <- metaReactive({ df <- cleanedData() req(df, input$x_var, input$y_var) validate( need(is.numeric(df[[input$x_var]]) || inherits(df[[input$x_var]], "Date"), "X-Axis must be numeric or a date."), need(is.numeric(df[[input$y_var]]), "Y-Axis must be numeric.") ) df <- maybe_parse_x(df, ..(input$x_var)) # Sample if needed (non-hex only) if (!..(input$use_hex) && nrow(df) > 5000) { set.seed(123) df <- df[sample(nrow(df), 5000), ] } num_colors <- if (!is.null(..(input$color_var)) && ..(input$color_var) != "None") length(unique(df[[..(input$color_var)]])) else 0 p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[..(input$x_var)]], y = .data[[..(input$y_var)]])) if (..(input$use_hex)) { p <- p + geom_hex(bins = ..(input$hex_bins)) + scale_fill_viridis_c() } else if (..(input$color_var) == "None" || num_colors > 30) { p <- p + geom_point(size = ..(input$point_size), color = ..(input$plot_color), shape = ..(as.numeric(input$point_shape)), alpha = ..(input$plot_alpha)) } else { p <- p + geom_point(aes(color = .data[[..(input$color_var)]]), size = ..(input$point_size), shape = ..(as.numeric(input$point_shape)), alpha = ..(input$plot_alpha)) } color_label <- if (..(input$color_var) != "None" && !..(input$use_hex) && num_colors <= 30) ..(input$color_var) else NULL p <- p + labs( title = paste("Scatterplot of", ..(input$x_var), "vs", ..(input$y_var)), x = ..(input$x_var), y = ..(input$y_var), color = color_label ) if (..(input$trendline)) p <- p + geom_smooth(aes(group = 1), method = "lm", color = "blue") apply_theme(p, ..(input$theme)) }) output$myPlot <- renderPlotly({ ggplotly(scatter_obj()) %>% layout(hovermode = "closest") }) output$downloadScatter <- downloadHandler( filename = function() paste0("scatter-", Sys.Date(), ".png"), content = function(file) ggsave(file, plot = scatter_obj(), device = "png", width = 8, height = 6) ) # ---- 9. Static scatter -------------------------------- static_scatter_obj <- metaReactive({ df <- cleanedData() req(df, input$x_var, input$y_var) validate( need(is.numeric(df[[input$x_var]]) || inherits(df[[input$x_var]], "Date"), "X-Axis must be numeric or a date."), need(is.numeric(df[[input$y_var]]), "Y-Axis must be numeric.") ) df <- maybe_parse_x(df, ..(input$x_var)) num_colors <- if (!is.null(..(input$color_var)) && ..(input$color_var) != "None") length(unique(df[[..(input$color_var)]])) else 0 p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[..(input$x_var)]], y = .data[[..(input$y_var)]])) if (..(input$color_var) == "None" || num_colors > 30) { p <- p + geom_point(size = ..(input$point_size), color = ..(input$plot_color), shape = ..(as.numeric(input$point_shape)), alpha = ..(input$plot_alpha)) } else { p <- p + geom_point(aes(color = .data[[..(input$color_var)]]), size = ..(input$point_size), shape = ..(as.numeric(input$point_shape)), alpha = ..(input$plot_alpha)) } color_label <- if (..(input$color_var) != "None" && num_colors <= 30) ..(input$color_var) else NULL p <- p + labs( title = paste("Static Scatterplot of", ..(input$x_var), "vs", ..(input$y_var)), x = ..(input$x_var), y = ..(input$y_var), color = color_label ) if (..(input$trendline)) p <- p + geom_smooth(aes(group = 1), method = "lm", color = "blue") apply_theme(p, ..(input$theme)) }) output$myStaticPlot <- renderPlot({ static_scatter_obj() }) output$downloadStaticScatter <- downloadHandler( filename = function() paste0("static-scatter-", Sys.Date(), ".png"), content = function(file) ggsave(file, plot = static_scatter_obj(), device = "png", width = 8, height = 6) ) # ---- 10. Histogram ------------------------------------ hist_obj <- metaReactive({ df <- cleanedData() req(df, input$hist_var, input$hist_var %in% names(df)) validate(need(is.numeric(df[[input$hist_var]]), "Please select a numeric variable for the histogram.")) p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[..(input$hist_var)]])) + geom_histogram(fill = ..(input$plot_color), color = "white", bins = ..(input$bins)) + labs(title = paste("Distribution of", ..(input$hist_var)), x = ..(input$hist_var), y = "Count") apply_theme(p, ..(input$theme)) }) output$myHist <- renderPlotly({ ggplotly(hist_obj()) }) output$downloadHist <- downloadHandler( filename = function() paste0("histogram-", Sys.Date(), ".png"), content = function(file) ggsave(file, plot = hist_obj(), device = "png") ) # ---- 11. Box plot ------------------------------------- box_obj <- metaReactive({ df <- cleanedData() req(df, input$x_var, input$y_var) validate( need(is.numeric(df[[input$y_var]]), "Boxplot requires a numeric Y-axis column."), need(length(unique(df[[input$x_var]])) <= 50, paste0("Too many categories (", length(unique(df[[input$x_var]])), "). Select a column with ≤ 50 unique groups.")) ) p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = as.factor(.data[[..(input$x_var)]]), y = .data[[..(input$y_var)]])) + geom_boxplot(fill = ..(input$plot_color), alpha = ..(input$plot_alpha), outlier.shape = NA) + labs(title = paste("Boxplot of", ..(input$y_var), "by", ..(input$x_var)), x = ..(input$x_var), y = ..(input$y_var)) apply_theme(p, ..(input$theme)) }) output$myBox <- renderPlotly({ ggplotly(box_obj()) }) output$downloadBox <- downloadHandler( filename = function() paste0("boxplot-", Sys.Date(), ".png"), content = function(file) ggsave(file, plot = box_obj(), device = "png") ) # ---- 12. Time trend ----------------------------------- # Deduplicated: single reactive parses dates once processedData <- reactive({ df <- cleanedData() req(df) try_parse_dates(df) }) trend_obj <- metaReactive({ df <- processedData() d_col <- names(df)[sapply(df, function(x) inherits(x, c("Date", "POSIXt")))][1] n_col <- ..(input$y_var) validate( need(!is.na(d_col), "No date column detected. Ensure your data has a column like '2023-01-01'."), need(is.numeric(df[[n_col]]), "Select a numeric column for the Y-axis to plot the time trend.") ) p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[d_col]], y = .data[[n_col]])) + geom_line(color = ..(input$plot_color), linewidth = ..(input$point_size) / 4, alpha = ..(input$plot_alpha)) + labs(title = "Time Trend Analysis", x = d_col, y = n_col) if (..(input$trendline)) p <- p + geom_smooth(method = "lm", linetype = "dashed") apply_theme(p, ..(input$theme)) }) output$timeTrend <- renderPlotly({ ggplotly(trend_obj()) }) output$downloadTrend <- downloadHandler( filename = function() paste0("trend-", Sys.Date(), ".png"), content = function(file) ggsave(file, plot = trend_obj(), device = "png") ) # ---- 13. Code display buttons ------------------------- observeEvent(input$showCodePlot, { output$plotCodeDisplay <- renderPrint({ expandChain(quote(library(ggplot2)), scatter_obj()) }) }) observeEvent(input$showCodeStaticPlot, { output$staticPlotCodeDisplay <- renderPrint({ expandChain(quote(library(ggplot2)), static_scatter_obj()) }) }) observeEvent(input$showCodeHist, { output$histCodeDisplay <- renderPrint({ expandChain(quote(library(ggplot2)), hist_obj()) }) }) observeEvent(input$showCodeBox, { output$boxCodeDisplay <- renderPrint({ expandChain(quote(library(ggplot2)), box_obj()) }) }) observeEvent(input$showCodeTrend, { output$trendCodeDisplay <- renderPrint({ expandChain(quote(library(ggplot2)), trend_obj()) }) }) } shinyApp(ui, server)
